subject: Outbound side-effect idempotency primitive
fact: Use claimOutboundArtifact/releaseOutboundArtifactClaim in src/bot/conversationStore.ts as the canonical duplicate-side-effect guard for user-visible sends. Current proven uses are reply, confirmation-card, and email-send; strongest protection belongs at the activity/handler that actually emits the side-effect.
reason: Future skills and orchestrator work need a shared, stable pattern for preventing duplicate external actions under retries, replays, and multi-round planning.
